titleStmt.title: SII 20.76: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 76. (B.K. No. 64 of 1935-36.) BĀḶAMBIḌ, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Rāmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 41, Hēmaḷaṁbi, Phāḷguṇa, s11u, 5, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1118, February 27, Sunday, f.d.t. ·91.

The inscription records a gift of land and garden for the benefit of the temple of Grāmēśvara by Barmmagāvuṇḍa of Baḷḷareyabīḍu, who was the subordinate of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tailahadēva of the Kadaṁba family governing Banavāsi-12000 and Pānuṁgal—500 and by the other prajes of the place. The gift was entrusted to Amṛitarās11i-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple. It further records other gifts of oil and income from taxes to the same temple by the 1000 taṁbuligas and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭārakasatyāśrayakuḷatiḷa ṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladē
vara vijayarājya mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyiyuttamire . © .
tatpādapadmōpajīvi . © . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bana
vāsi puravarādhīśvaraṁ jayaṁtīmadhukēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasādaṁ mrigama
dāmōdaṁ triyakṣakṣumākṣasaṁbhava caturāsītinagarādhiṣṭitalalāṭa
lōcanaṁ caturbbhujajagadvitidaśāṣṭāśvādamēdhadīkṣādīkṣita himavadugirīṁdraruṁdrasi
kharisaktisaṁsthāpitaschaṭikasiḷāstaṁbhabaddhamadagajamahamahimābhirāma kā
dambacakri mayūravarmma permmaṭṭitūryyanirgghōṣaṇa sākhācarēṁdradhvaja virāja mānamā
nōttuṁgasiṁghalāṁchana dattārttikāṁcana samaradayakāraṇa pratāpamārttaṁḍa mārkoḷuva
ra gaṁḍa nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara tailahadēvarasaru bana
vasepannircchāsiramumaṁ pānuṁgalainūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ pānuṁgalla nele
vī ḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire . © . nuḍi satyaṁ sacaritraṁ naḍe guṇa
makhiḷānandamudyatupratāpaṁ toḍarddirdārātibhūpāḷakabaḷavijayaśrīsa
mākrīḍe cittaṁ mriḍapādāṁbhōjabhaktiprabaḷate śaraṇārtthibrajādhīnameṁtuṁ paḍedartthaṁ
kuḍe lōkōttaraviditayaśaṁ tayilabhūpāḷadēva . © . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . © .
© maṁneyagētaṁgaṁguṇaduṁnatiyaṁtaḷedukaṁcikabbegavogedaṁ munnina pāṁḍutanūbha
varannarppuruśārtthatīrttharaivarmmakkaḷu . piriyaṁ bammane dharmmarājanesedirppā dāsamaṁ bhīma nanna
ḷaṁ ballinappa śōbhanane tāṁ mikkarjunaṁ siṁganuṁ puruṣārtthāgraṇi Aycanuṁ lakuḷasaha
dēvarkkaḷāgalu vasundhareyoḷu pāṁḍavarinnumiḻdarenaliṁtiyvaruṁ raṁjiparu . Avaroḷa
pratāpavibhavaṁ kali śōbhananuttarōttarapravihaḷabhāgi śōbavanapārayasaṁ kala sōbhanaṁ guṇārna
vatuhināṁsu śōbhananudārada tāymane sōbhanaṁ babāppavarivaraṁnane nija kuḷāṁbaracaṁ
dramarīci sōbhana . negaḻda guṇābdhi siṁgavibhugaṁ kuḷabhūśaṇeyappa bāgaḷabbegavanītaḷaṁ po
gaḷe puṭṭidarujvaḷa cārukīrttilakṣmige patigaḷu vivēkanidhigaḷu vibhu śōbhanaṁ bamma gauṁḍugaḷu . puruTheḷa is written above the line.
ṣārttada nele satyada karu parahitalakṣmigikkedāṇaṁ saucācārada bāḷmodaleṁnade naraneṁbudu siṁ
ganaṇuganaṁ śōbhanana . Avanoḍane vuṭṭidaṁ kairavavallabhanoḍane puṭṣidairāvata meṁbavolu
kīrttilakṣmībhavanaṁ jayalakṣmigāṇmanenisuva barmma . bhavacaraṇābjaṣaṭṭaraṇa nūrjjitabhakti
tōmanaṟpriyaṁ kuvaḷeyabaṁdhu vīralakṣminiṭaḷāgralalāmanāśritōtsavakarana
pratima cārugabhīranenutta kūrttu bhūbhuvanamadāgaḷuṁ bayasi baṇnisu tippuduba
mmagaumvuḍana . © . keḷardda kiśōrakēsarige kōḷmasagirdda viśōragaṁge kuppuḷisi ku nuṁgi pāyva
garjjisutippa javaṁgōrppaḍaggaḷamene koṁdu kūguvanarātibaḷaṁ taledōṟe bammigaṁ mu
ḷidaḍe mrittu mīṟidaḍe māri kaḍaṁgidoḍāṁpa gaṁḍarāru . meccidaḷīgaḷīga kali bammagauvuṁḍa
ḷoḷirḻdu meyveccida vīralakṣmi naramāṁsamaniṁbaḻdukilli vairiganyarccaladiṁda vāṁpavaru
nutaṁ bidinōḍi cīlipaṁ sārccida vairivīrara cirāyuvanājiyoḷēṁ pravīṇanō .
nuḍidude naṁni māḍidude śāsanameṁba negarttevetta nānnuḍi tanagoppe peṁpuvaḍedirdda mahōnnati
rmmamaṁ parahitakāryyamaṁ neṟeye mārppeḍegaṁ saledharmmarājaneṁdoḍārddo reyene munnina
dattaninivaṁ mēlendoḍī kālada sthira kali barmmanoḷēṁ samaṁ barpparē . gāṁvuḍuṁ prajegaḷuṁ sthirāyu
gavīśvaraṁgavanurāgade ṣaṇmukhanoldupuṭṭuvaṁtire kali śōbhanaṁgavakhiḷātaḷa saṁstute
kavvegaṁ nirupamakīrtti vīralakṣmīpati puṭṭidanātmavaṁśavistaramahimāprabhāva menutirppudu
naṁ jagajjana . baḷḷāreya bīḍina prajegaḷiṁtu kritārttharādarī gaurīvallabhanappa
śagrāmēśvaradēvaruṁ tavage deIvamu māhāprabhu barmmagāvuṁḍana meṁmumaṁ ni
sutikkenutaṁ samasta dharmaṁgaḷivellamaṁ nōḍi māḍuvareṁdaḍadēṁ prasiddharō . sthānācāryyar .
tu samastalōkadoḷaguḷḷa janastutarappa Umāpati mahāmahimasthāṇuvenippa kā
ḷēśvaradēvarācāryyarumappa bāḷacaṁdrapaṁḍitadēvanenippaniṁtu gurukuḷā gamānvayasiddharu . © .
Avargganurāgadiṁ pogaḷe puṭṭidariṁtu kīrttilakṣmīpativallabhanappa brahmaliṁgipaṁḍitariṁtenalu dhanya
ru hāḍiŪra kāḷēśvaradēvara maṭhada saṁmadhi baḷḷāreya bīḍina grāmēśvara dēvarācāryyarappamri
tarāsipaṁḍitadēvaridēṁ kritārttharō . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāna dhāraṇamō
nānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīḷaguṇa saṁpannaru sadasadācāritacaritaniyamaru Agaṇyapu
ṇyaprabhāvaprasiddharu sakaḷavimaḷakēvaḷāvaprabōdharu sakaḷajanakumudānaṁdacaṁdraru
vineyavinamitōttuṁgasaṁgatyarumappa śrīmadamritarāsipaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārapū
rvvakaṁ māḍi svasti śrīmacāḷukya vikramakālada nālvattoṁdeneya hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada phālu
guṇa suddha paṁcami Ādivāra vyatīpātadaṁdu śrīmanu mahāprabhu bammagāvuṁḍaṁ tanna prabhutvadū
ru baḷḷāreya bīḍina samasta prajegaḷuṁ tānumirddu māḍuva dharmmamaṁ nitya pūjeyaṁ nōḍi dharmmamaṁ cittado
ḷu tāḷdi śrīgrāmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nityanivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnō ddhārakaṁ cayitra paiyitrakkaṁ
māṭakūṭaprāsādānēka karṁmāṁtarakeṁdu Ā kaligeṟeya keḷage tuṁbina horeyalu biṭa garde matta 1 matta
biṭṭigoṁḍada baḷiya hakalu matta 1 mattaṁ Ā kalegeṟeya keḷage dēvarige koṭṭa tōṁṭada mara 500 ma
ttaṁ Akkivaḷḷiya ṭhāṇāṁtarada ru biṭṭa dharmma nūṟu hēṟiṁge mūṟu hēṟina suṁkava bi
ṭṭaru mattaṁ taṁbuliga sāsirvva dēvargge biṭṭa dharmma hoṁge 2 . mattaṁ dēvara naṁdādīvigegaṁ māneṇneyaṁ
biṭṭagāṇa 1 Iṁtī dharmmavanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁge gaṁge vāraṇāsi gurukṣētra prayāge ya
rghyatīrththaṁgaḷeṁba puṁṇyatīrtthasthānaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratuna
doḷu kaṭṭisi sāsirvvaru vēdapāragarumappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ sāsirvvaru tapōdhanargga (ṁ)mubhaya
mukhigoṭṭa phaḻamakku Iṁtī dharmmama gāṁvuḍuṁ prajegaḷumirdu pratipāḷisu varu Iṁtī dharmmamanāvanōrvvana
ḷidanā tīrtthasthānadoḷu sāsirakavileya sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇaruma sāsirvvaru tapōdhanaruma
naḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakkuṁ . © . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadu
bhi sarvvānētānu bhāginapārtthivēṁdrānu bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . © . huligeṟeya bammōja
tāne baredu kaṁḍarisida sāsana [.]
Digital edition of SII 20.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
